children.label: a
children.text: Funds appropriated to carry out this chapter may not be used for purposes that are inconsistent with the Assisted Suicide Funding Restriction Act of 1997 ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 14401

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary may furnish sensori-neural aids only in accordance with guidelines prescribed by the Secretary.
